zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth於大約1609年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德。她於1622年6月30日與William Tuttle在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1684年12月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年76歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth于大约1609年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾林斯亞德。她于1622年6月30日与William Tuttle在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1684年12月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年76岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth was born about 1609, in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England. She married William Tuttle on 30 June 1622, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 30 December 1684, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76, and was buried in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth est née environ 1609, à Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William Tuttle le 30 juin 1622, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 décembre 1684, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth wurde um 1609 in Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England geboren. Sie hat am 30. Juni 1622 in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America William Tuttle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Dezember 1684 im Alter von 76 Jahren in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth è nata il circa 1609 nel Ringstead, Northamptonshire, England. Lei sposato William Tuttle il 30 giugno 1622, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 30 dicembre 1684, nel New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabethは約1609年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアリングステアドで生まれた。1622年6月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンでWilliam Tuttleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1684年12月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンで76歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth(은)는 대략 1609년 영국 노르섬프토실르 링스테아드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1622년 6월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 William Tuttle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1684년 12월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nasceu aproximadamente 1609, em Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William Tuttle em 30 de junho de 1622, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1684, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth родилась около 1609 г. в местности рингстид, нортамптоншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Tuttle 30 июня 1622 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 30 декабря 1684 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth nació aproximadamente 1609, en Ringstead, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con William Tuttle el 30 de junio de 1622, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1684, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
